name: rdt-cli
description: Reddit in your terminal — browse feeds, read posts, search, upvote, save, and subscribe via reverse-engineered API.

commands.name: login
commands.description: Extract and save browser cookies for authentication

commands.name: read
commands.description: Read a specific post with comments

commands.name: show
commands.description: Read the Nth post from the last listing

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export search results to CSV or JSON

use_cases: Browse and summarize Reddit discussions on a topic
Search Reddit for community feedback on tools or libraries
Export Reddit threads for analysis or reporting
